response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across various domains and technologies, demonstrating strong programming skills and problem-solving abilities. However, his resume lacks direct evidence of embedded networking, Linux kernel modification, security technologies (e.g., MACsec, IEEE 802.1X), or Japanese language proficiency, which are critical for this role. His background in web and high-level systems may not align closely enough with the embedded security requirements.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and frameworks
Proven ability to work in collaborative and agile environments
Strong problem-solving skills with a focus on testable and maintainable code
concerns: No demonstrated experience with embedded systems or network switch firmware development
Lacks explicit experience with Linux kernel modification or security technologies (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X)
No evidence of Japanese language proficiency, which is a required qualification
